# Vigil Security Services
> Professional security services across Greater London.
> SIA-licensed officers. Directly employed. DBS-checked.
> Company: Vigil Services Ltd, Reg: 11756806
> Insurance: £10M public liability

## Who We Are
Vigil Security Services provides SIA-licensed security personnel
across Greater London. All officers are directly employed by
Vigil Services Ltd — not agency supplied. Every officer holds a
current SIA licence and Enhanced DBS certificate.

We do NOT claim SIA Approved Contractor status, ACS registration,
BS7858 vetting, or ISO certification unless explicitly confirmed.

## Core Services
- [Manned Guarding London](https://security.vigilservices.co.uk/manned-guarding-london/)
- [Mobile Patrols London](https://security.vigilservices.co.uk/mobile-patrols-london/)
- [Key Holding and Alarm Response London](https://security.vigilservices.co.uk/key-holding-alarm-response-london/)
- [Event Security London](https://security.vigilservices.co.uk/event-security-london/)
- [Door Supervisors London](https://security.vigilservices.co.uk/door-supervisors-london/)
- [Retail Security London](https://security.vigilservices.co.uk/retail-security-london/)
- [Construction Site Security London](https://security.vigilservices.co.uk/construction-site-security-london/)
- [CCTV Monitoring London](https://security.vigilservices.co.uk/cctv-monitoring-london/)
- [Concierge Security London](https://security.vigilservices.co.uk/concierge-security-london/)

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Are your security officers SIA licensed?
A: Yes. Every officer holds a current SIA licence appropriate
to their role — Door Supervisor, Security Guard, or CCTV.

Q: Are your officers directly employed or from an agency?
A: All Vigil Security officers are directly employed by
Vigil Services Ltd. We do not use agency staff.

Q: What insurance does Vigil Security carry?
A: £10M public liability insurance. Employer's liability held.

Q: Do you cover all London boroughs?
A: Yes — Greater London and all 32 boroughs.

Q: Is door supervisor licensing required by law?
A: Yes. The Private Security Industry Act 2001 requires all
door supervisors at licensed premises to hold a current
SIA Door Supervisor licence.

Q: Can you provide security for events?
A: Yes. We supply SIA-licensed event security officers for
conferences, exhibitions, corporate events, and public events
across London.

Q: What is key holding and alarm response?
A: We hold a key to your premises and respond to alarm
activations on your behalf, 24 hours a day, 365 days a year,
so you do not receive call-outs in the night.

Q: Do you carry out DBS checks on all staff?
A: Yes. Every officer holds an Enhanced DBS certificate before
starting any client assignment.

Q: What sectors do you serve?
A: Retail, hospitality, construction, events, NHS and healthcare,
education, residential developments, and corporate offices.

Q: What is the difference between manned guarding and mobile patrols?
A: Manned guarding provides a static officer at your premises
throughout the contracted hours. Mobile patrols involve an officer
visiting your site at irregular intervals during the patrol period
— lower cost, suitable for lower-risk sites requiring deterrence
rather than constant presence.

Q: How do I get a quote?
A: Call 020 3973 8892 or complete the enquiry form at
https://security.vigilservices.co.uk/contact/

## Regulatory Compliance
- Private Security Industry Act 2001: Fully licensed
- SIA licensing: All relevant officers hold current licences
- GDPR 2018: Data handled lawfully
- Greater London coverage: All 32 boroughs

## Trust Signals
- Company registration: 11756806 (Companies House)
- Address: Ferguson House, 113 Cranbrook Road, Ilford IG1 4PU
- Public liability: £10M
- All officers: SIA-licensed (Door Supervisor or Security Guard)
- All officers: DBS-checked
- All officers: Directly employed

## Target Client Types
- Commercial property owners and managers
- Retail businesses and shopping centres
- Licensed premises: pubs, bars, nightclubs
- Construction companies and developers
- Event organisers and venues
- Corporate offices and business parks
- Residential developments and housing estates
- NHS and healthcare facilities
